Event: The Supreme Sorcery Festival
Event Date: 01/08/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: S12


Other locations the gear can be found
Mystic Dragon
Guardian of Dozen Blades Sword

When attacking, has a 20-22% chance of restoring 9-11% health in self.

Once in a while over 5 sec, the unit's attacks have 55% chance to stun the target for 1 sec and deal additional pure damage equal to 15% of the target's max health.

Requirements: 98-100
